description: You are a Community Manager triaging a busy mailing list inbox. Separate ongoing conversation threads from new topics by creating two folders: 'Community-Replies' and 'New-Topics'. Move emails with subjects starting with 'Re:' or 'RE:' into 'Community-Replies' and all other emails into 'New-Topics'. In the 'New-Topics' folder, flag every email containing a question mark '?' in its subject line. Send a status email to 'devrel@project.org' with the subject 'Triage Status' reporting the final counts of emails in both folders.
